text.title: Graph RAG in Production Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Random latency spikes 30s+; cost per query erratic.
antipattern.root-cause: All queries dispatched to GLOBAL retrieval regardless of intent.
antipattern.fix: Insert classifier (haiku) at ingress; route GLOBAL vs LOCAL vs COMMUNITY.

antipattern.symptom: Retrievals see partially-applied updates; relevance flips between identical queries.
antipattern.root-cause: New docs written directly into graph store while traffic is live.
antipattern.fix: Replace with delta event stream + atomic version flip.

antipattern.symptom: Daily LLM bill jumps 10x after a marketing campaign sends loosely-worded queries.
antipattern.root-cause: No max-cost-per-query-type cap; router accepts any GLOBAL query.
antipattern.fix: Add USD cap per query type; 429 over cap; alert ops.
